title: 2021 Grants Pass High School Graduation
html: Stub. Yahir's high school graduation, May/June 2021, Grants Pass. Group-staggered ceremony with assigned graduation slots (groups 2nd / 4th, with 4th at 7:30 PM). Iracema Vargas coordinated grandparent attendance. Logistics and group-swap correspondence with Mrs. Gerard captured in 2021 05 30 dear mrs gerard. Marks the end of grants pass teen era and the bridge to OSU freshman year.

related.label: Dear Mrs. Gerard — drafted-as-mom apology to swap graduation groups back
